emails.subject: RE: Discussion with Rick Hawley
emails.body: RE: Discussion with Rick Hawley Let's discuss on Monday.. I am open to either plan. BT To: Tycholiz, Barry

emails.subject: RE: Discussion with Rick Hawley
emails.body: RE: Discussion with Rick Hawley I would be happy to take a run at this, see where the customer is at, and then set up a joint session for you and me. I will update you asap. BT To: Tycholiz, Barry

emails.subject: RE: Discussion with Rick Hawley
emails.body: sounds good Chris Calger 503-464-3735 To: Calger, Christopher F.
